main_track.bias_notes: Classic half-mile speed bias. Inside posts dominate due to tight turns and short stretches, but the passing lane allows pocket-sitters a chance to angle out.
main_track.post_bias: Posts 1-4 hold a strong tactical advantage. Outside posts (7-8) face severe ground loss.

handicapping_angles.half_mile_speed_bias: Heavily upgrade early speed ('E' types) drawn inside. Closers are severely compromised unless a suicidal pace duel causes a total meltdown.
handicapping_angles.passing_lane_pocket: The pocket-sitter behind the leader has a major advantage down the passing lane.
